_meta.purpose: Session-aware 1h-native pilot features (NYSE calendar, America/New_York). ALL entries are optin: they never enter the default manifest and activate only when a per-asset override selects them explicitly.
_meta.causal_clock: the decision bar's own close; session grouping by ET calendar day; the session schedule is ex-ante knowledge

features.name: day_range_pos_session
features.formula: (close[t] - min(low, session start..t)) / (max(high, session start..t) - min(low, session start..t)); 0.5 when the session range is zero
